Title: Store Director — Paris Flagship
Description: Lead the flagship boutique for one of France's most prestigious fashion houses. Full P&L responsibility, team of 45+ associates, and direct reporting to the Retail Director Europe.
Responsibilities:
P&L management for the flagship store
Team leadership and development of 45+ associates
Client relationship management at the highest level
Visual merchandising oversight
Retail KPI tracking and reporting
Requirements:
Minimum 8 years in luxury retail with at least 3 years as Store Director
Flagship or high-volume boutique experience
Fluent French and English
Proven track record managing teams of 30+
Strong luxury clienteling and CRM understanding
Nice to Haves:
Additional European languages valued
Experience with luxury hospitality
Knowledge of haute couture
